Stephen Album Rare Coins - Auction 54, Lot 88 — BYZANTINE EMPIRE: Constans II Pogonatus, 641-668, AV solidus (4.39g), Constantinople, SB-964, with Constantine IV, Heraclius, and Tiberius, 1st officina, half-length busts of Constans II, wearing plum
sales.description:
BYZANTINE EMPIRE: Constans II Pogonatus, 641-668, AV solidus (4.39g), Constantinople, SB-964, with Constantine IV, Heraclius, and Tiberius, 1st officina, half-length busts of Constans II, wearing plumed helmet, and Constantine IV facing, cross between them // cross potent on three steps, Heraclius and Tiberius standing to the sides, slightly clipped, lightly lustrous, Strike 5/5, Surface 4/5, NGC graded Choice XF.

Estimate: 600 - 800 USD...

Estimate: 750 - 1000 USD...
